title: Squishy Dinosaur Stress Toys - Assorted Colours, 9CM, T-Rex, Triceratops, Stegosaurus, Fidget Toys, Squishies, Novelty Party Bag Fillers, Sensory Fun for Children with Anxiety ADHD
features: 🦖 🦕 🦎 🤩 STEGOSAURUS STRESS RELIEF - These dynamic dinosaur stress toys are a great way to ease the stresses of modern life. Embark on a playful stress-relief adventure with these squishy dinosaurs, and watch as the stress melts away, leaving behind only a smile. Each of these amazing and unique stress dinosaur toys features an adorable and friendly dinosaur design (T-Rex, Triceratops and Stegosaurus), capturing the imagination of every dino-lover!

🦖 🦕 🦎 🤩 PREHISTORIC POCKET-SIZED PLAYMATES - These 3 squishy fidget toys have been especially crafted to be small and lightweight, which makes these creatures ideal for on-the-go adventures. Slip them into your pocket, backpack, or purse, and carry the joy of play wherever you go. The fun and unique design of the animals are sure to stimulate your child's imagination and creativity as they devise exciting new scenarios to test out their new toys!

🦖 🦕 🦎 🤩 IDEAL PARTY FAVOURS AND STOCKING FILLERS - We designed these novelty toys in a fun and unique way with bright colours and amusing expressions that ensures they will be a memorable gift. Be sure to stock up on these impressive and funny squeeze toys next time you're organising a dinosaur themed party or purchasing stocking fillers for a dinosaur lover!

🦖 🦕 🦎 🤩 DURABLE AND SAFE - Your safety is our top priority so we made sure that this product was made from high-quality materials. These products carries a CE mark which means it meets rigorous health, safety and environmental protection requirements. This ensures the stretchable toy creatures are durable and will provide you with long-lasting enjoyment

🦖 🦕 🦎 🤩 INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - In each package you will receive a pack of three stretchy dinosaurs. Each toy dinosaur measures approximately 9 x 4 x 4.5cm (3.51 x 1.57 x 1.77"). The set includes T-Rex, Triceratops and Stegosaurus toys each in a bold and distinct colour that will bring joy to dinosaur enthusiasts of any age. Please Note: This product is not suitable for children under the age of 3
